Metadata.title: Sasha Elisabeth — Teambuilding & Coaching
Metadata.description: Creative arts therapy and coaching for people who want to discover themselves and grow.

hero.intro: My name is Sasha Elisabeth and I guide teams and individuals in making visible what's happening beneath the surface, and the patterns that move with it. Coaching and creative methods open up space for insight, connection and lasting growth.

aanbod.title: Working in a way that suits you.

teambuilding.label: Teambuilding
teambuilding.title: Stronger together through creative work
bullets: Connection and collaboration within your team
Insights you can apply right away
teambuilding.priceNote: excl. VAT · groups up to 13 people

coaching.label: Individual Coaching
coaching.title: Insight into what's going on, movement within yourself
bullets: Through your employer or on your own initiative
Trajectories focused on personal and work-related growth

vrouwen.label: Women in the workplace
vrouwen.title: Standing stronger in your work and position
bullets: For organisations who want to support their female employees
Focus on position, communication and boundaries

overMij.title: Working from doing, not just from thinking.
overMij.intro: My name is Sasha Elisabeth. I guide teams and individuals in creating insight, connection and momentum.
overMij.training: I trained as a creative arts therapist, where I learned to look beyond words alone. Through coaching and creative methods, I make visible what's happening beneath the surface and help people break through patterns.
overMij.experience: Alongside my own practice, I work within addiction care and youth care, guiding people through complex situations. I bring that experience into how I work: engaged, clear and without judgement.
overMij.drive: What drives me is the moment someone reconnects with themselves and space opens up for real change.

contact.title: The first conversation is always without obligation.
contact.intro: Want to know more, or ready to make a request? Fill in the contact form and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.process: We always start with an online introductory conversation of up to one hour. In it, we discuss your wishes and expectations, the practical details, and figure out together what fits your situation best.

ContactForm.serviceLabel: What would you like to get in touch about?
ContactForm.reasonPlaceholder: For example: a collaboration or a general question
ContactForm.errorGeneric: Sending failed. Please try again later
ContactForm.sentSubtitle: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

ServicePage.ctaTitle: The first conversation is always without obligation.
ServicePage.comingSoonBody: Want to know more already? Feel free to get in touch.
